tweets.text: Fed held rates, but “one hike this year” kept markets on edge. Yields and real rates re-priced, growth stocks wobbled mid-week, and oil slid ~25% dragging gold and Bitcoin. Still, AI/mega-cap tech leadership held up on the week.
